sections.paragraph:
Original: קנת

Transliteration: qenâth

Phonetic: ken-awth'

BDB Definition:

Kenath = "possession"
  1. a city in Gilead east of the Jordan taken possession of by a certain Nobah and renamed in his own honour

Origin: from H7069

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
